choices.text: Procore (industry leader), Autodesk Construction Cloud, PlanGrid, Buildertrend (residential), e-Builder (gov). Cloud + mobile-first. Drawing management, RFIs, submittals, pay apps, daily reports. 14-20% productivity gains typical.

Tablets/phones with construction app (Procore, etc.): drawings, daily reports, photos, RFI creation, T&M tickets, punch lists, safety inspections. Offline mode + auto-sync. Subs use same app. Replaces paper + email chains.
